## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` тАФ new feature
- [ ] `fix`  тАФ bug fix
- [ ] `perf` тАФ performance improvement
- [ ] `refactor` тАФ no behaviour change
- [ ] `docs` тАФ documentation only
- [ ] `ci`   тАФ CI/CD changes

## Checklist

- [ ] Builds cleanly on Linux (`./scripts/build.sh`)
- [ ] `scripts/format.sh` run with no diffs
- [ ] New code has no `// TODO` left unaddressed
- [ ] Audio callback is still lock-free and allocation-free
- [ ] PR targets `dev`, not `main`
